message:
fix(reactor/io_uring): filter stale completions for deregistered tokens

Move the event emission inside the registration lookup guard so that
completions for tokens that have been deregistered between submission and
completion are silently dropped instead of surfacing as user-visible events.

Previously, the event was pushed unconditionally before checking if the token
was still registered. This meant a deregistered token's final completion could
appear as a spurious event, confusing the event consumer.

The re-arm step (poll_add resubmission) was already inside the guard, so it
correctly skipped stale tokens — but the event had already been emitted.

Add test that submits a poll_add for an unregistered token, triggers
a completion via wake(), and asserts the stale token never appears in the
events iterator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
